data.body: Re-pushed stack CI: 560/561/563 Verified+1 GREEN; 558(ddbe) Verified-1 = macOS runner FLAKE (OSError could not create numbered dir /Users/runner/work/_temp/rebar-basetemp after 10 tries - pytest basetemp exhaustion, broad across unrelated tests, NOT my code). Posted 'recheck' on 558. 576/579 Verified pending. 3183 implementer + 4b5b review running.
